ValidationRule.description: Enforces minimum 200-character description when nepa_description__c is populated. Truncated descriptions degrade CE classification accuracy (NEPATEC feature lift 0.71). Does not fire on blank descriptions.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Process Description must be at least 200 characters. Include: purpose, location summary, disturbance type (new/existing/renewal), and estimated acreage. This improves CE screening accuracy.
